name: Zhejiang Jingxing Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jingxing Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd. produces and sells paper products primarily in China. It offers Kraft liner boards, white top linerboards, bobbin base papers, corrugated base papers, corrugated cardboards, paper boxes, bobbin base papers, and other specialty papers under the Jingxing brand name. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Pinghu, China.
